comment: Voices demonstrated on decklight.io. Audio lives in site/voices/<dir>/ in this repo (the publish workflow ships it with the site); generate/refresh locally with: GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=<project> node tools/voiceover.mjs demo/showcase.html --engine gemini --voice <Voice> --no-llm -o site/voices/<dir>  (incremental: only changed slides re-synthesize), then commit the changed files.
